question: Agents spawned via /research frequently confuse their CWD — they assume repo root but are actually in companies/{slug}. What is the best way to anchor CWD awareness in sub-agent prompts?
context: Observed in agent run 20260324_232558_adz3: agent tried paths like companies/ghq/tools/ and ./companies/ghq/tools/file/write-file.sh when already inside companies/ghq, causing 5 errors before self-correcting via pwd
